manifest.name: Implicit TODOs
manifest.description: Identifies hidden technical debt and maintenance tasks that standard grep searches miss by scanning for non-standard phrases like 'hack' or 'refactor this'. This manifest tracks purpose, has_todo, and todo_summary to help agents locate and prioritize cleanup work across a polyglot codebase.

analyzers.name: Code Intent
analyzers.description: Generates a discovery-optimized summary and metadata, including Action-Object keywords, functional parent domains, interface types, and logic constraints.

analyzers.name: Implicit TODO Finder
analyzers.description: Identifies implicit work items in code comments by scanning for phrases like 'refactor this' or 'hack', while ignoring standard tags like 'TODO:'.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: A change-centric summary starting with "Modify this file to change..." or "Use this file to change...".

fields.name: has_todo
fields.description: True if implicit work items are found.

fields.name: todo_summary
fields.description: A concise summary of the implicit work items found.
